summary: Comprehensive testing of DDT (Documento di Trasporto) module - Backend CRUD (20/20 tests passed), PDF generation, line calculations with cascading discounts, and frontend UI verification. One bug fixed: auto-causale logic for conto_lavoro and rientro types.

bugs_fixed.issue: Auto-causale not setting correctly for conto_lavoro and rientro_conto_lavoro DDT types
bugs_fixed.root_cause: DDTCreate model has default causale_trasporto='Vendita', so the auto-set logic 'if not causale' never triggered for non-vendita types
bugs_fixed.fix: Modified routes/ddt.py to check: if not causale OR (causale=='Vendita' AND ddt_type!='vendita') then auto-set causale

backend_api.GET /api/ddt/causali: PASS - Returns 7 causali (Vendita, Conto Lavoro, Reso Conto Lavoro, etc.)
backend_api.POST /api/ddt/ vendita: PASS - Creates DDT with DDT-{year}-{seq} number, status=non_fatturato
backend_api.POST /api/ddt/ conto_lavoro: PASS - Creates DDT with CL-{year}-{seq} prefix, auto-causale='Conto Lavoro'
backend_api.POST /api/ddt/ rientro_conto_lavoro: PASS - Creates DDT with RCL-{year}-{seq} prefix, auto-causale='Reso Conto Lavoro'
backend_api.GET /api/ddt/: PASS - Lists DDTs with optional filters (ddt_type, status, search)
backend_api.GET /api/ddt/{ddt_id}: PASS - Returns single DDT, 404 for non-existent
backend_api.PUT /api/ddt/{ddt_id}: PASS - Updates DDT, recalculates totals when lines/sconto_globale/acconto change
backend_api.calc_totals: PASS - Correctly computes subtotal, sconto_val, imponibile, total_vat (multiple rates), total, da_pagare

frontend_ui.DDT nav link in sidebar: PASS - Truck icon, highlighted when active
frontend_ui.DDTListPage table: PASS - Columns: Numero, Tipo (badge), Cliente, Causale, Totale, Stato (badge), Data, actions
frontend_ui.DDTListPage empty state: PASS - Shows 'Nessun DDT trovato' with 'Crea il primo DDT' button
frontend_ui.DDTEditorPage data-testid: PASS - ddt-editor, select-ddt-type, select-client, input-subject, btn-add-line, btn-save-ddt, btn-download-pdf
frontend_ui.DDTEditorPage sidebar 4 tabs: PASS - Trasporto, Destin., Pagam., Note - all clickable with correct content
frontend_ui.DDTEditorPage lines table: PASS - Columns: #, Codice, Descrizione, UdM, Q.tà, Prezzo, Sc.1%, Sc.2%, Totale, IVA
frontend_ui.DDTEditorPage totals: PASS - Totale senza IVA, Imponibile, Totale IVA, TOTALE displayed correctly
frontend_ui.Create DDT flow: PASS - Fill form → Save → Toast 'DDT creato' → Redirect to /ddt/{ddt_id} → PDF button visible
frontend_ui.Edit DDT flow: PASS - Page title 'Modifica DDT', DDT number shown (DDT-2026-0001), status badge

sidebar_tabs_content.Trasporto: Causale Trasporto, Aspetto Beni, Porto, Mezzo, Vettore, Data/Ora Trasporto, Colli, P. Lordo, P. Netto
sidebar_tabs_content.Destinazione: Ragione Sociale, Indirizzo, CAP, Località, Prov., Telefono, Cellulare
sidebar_tabs_content.Pagamento: Condizioni Pagamento, Sconto Globale %, Acconto, 'Stampa prezzi in PDF' checkbox

critical_code_review_comments: calc_line correctly implements cascading discounts formula
calc_totals properly handles multiple VAT rates per line
PDF service uses ReportLab with proper formatting and supports stampa_prezzi toggle
Frontend calculations mirror backend exactly - good consistency
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
test_credentials: Created test user via MongoDB (test-ddt-*), cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test DDTs created during backend tests, cleaned up in fixture teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: DDT module fully tested. Key features: 1) Three DDT types (vendita, conto_lavoro, rientro_conto_lavoro) with auto-number prefix (DDT, CL, RCL). 2) Auto-causale based on type. 3) Cascading line discounts (sconto_1, sconto_2). 4) Global discount and acconto in totals. 5) PDF generation with stampa_prezzi toggle. 6) Invoicex-style editor with 4 sidebar tabs. BUG FIXED: Auto-causale logic now correctly handles non-vendita types.
